name: Lime & Soda
title: Lime & Soda Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Lime & Soda Cocktail | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A clean, crisp highball that combines Bacardí Lime Flavoured rum with club soda and a lime wheel garnish.
marketing_description: For a clean, crisp cocktail, try a BACARDÍ Lime & Soda. Ice-cold sparkling soda water provides the perfect base from which to appreciate the zestiness of the BACARDÍ Lime flavour. A simple and fruitful serve that's a good low-calorie alternative to a vodka soda.

steps: Fill a highball glass with cubed ice.
Pour in BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum, followed by club soda.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Lime & Soda 44 ml BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum 89 ml Club Soda ... 1 Chill Fill a highball glass with cubed ice. 2 Pour Pour in BACARDÍ Lime Flavoured rum, followed by club soda. 3 Stir Stir gently. 4 Garnish Garnish with a lime wheel.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Lime & Soda Rum Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
